exercises.code:
import unicodedata
a = "José"
b = "José"
print("raw==", a == b)
print("NFC==", unicodedata.normalize("NFC", a) == unicodedata.normalize("NFC", b))
print("causa: formas Unicode distintas (NFC vs NFD residual)")

exercises.code:
import re
email = "user+tag@example.com"
pat = re.compile(r"^[a-z]+@[a-z]+\.com$")
rejected = pat.fullmatch(email) is None
print("rejected=", rejected)
print("política: un @, local/dominio no vacíos y cero espacios (no regex ingenua)")
